title: Sketches
description: A collection of sketches made over the last four years. Most explore strong sociocultural narratives of Ukrainian culture from a refugee's perspective.

title: Playback Posters
description: Posters for various performances primarily held by "Kochivnyky" playback theatre.

title: Guiding Maps
description: A collection of maps created for various events and projects. Created using Adobe Illustrator and/or GoPaint.

title: A Home
description: Three.js based random house generator. To be used as an ever changing interactive postcard. Gifted in 2026.
